author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

PAY SOLANA TRANSACTION FEES IN ATLAS

Introducing ATLAS PRIME, our new solution that reduces friction and increases game adoption by enabling users to pay their Solana transaction fees directly in ATLAS.

Available first in SAGE Labs.  

 | Learn more: https://medium.com/star-atlas/star-atlas-atlas-prime-pay-solana-network-fees-in-atlas-85472d5803d6
